vllm.title: [kernel] Support W4A8 on Hopper
vllm.author: czhu-cohere
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add support in vLLM for CUTLASS-based W4A8 kernel on Hopper, see example 55 which uses LUT trick to bypass int4 -> bf16 -> fp8 conversion in the GEMM mainloop. This improves the compute-bound performance and allows W4A8 to approach peak FP8 throughput while still maintaining the fast decodin
